dataset: Internet Archive / Wikimedia Commons Audio Samples
privileged_info_summary: The task uses real public domain audio samples (Beethoven's Moonlight Sonata or Art of War narration from LibriVox, with a Wikimedia Commons fallback) downloaded during the environment installation. The target file is copied to '/home/ga/Audio/import_me.wav' and must be imported into the existing Ardour session 'MyProject'.
